flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Whitworth University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3k → 1.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Whitworth University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($47.6k → $52.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Whitworth University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($47.6k → $52.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 8 pp at Whitworth University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (68.4% vs 76.4%).
